notes.content: Anchor registry note. Anchor token CB-4096 resolves to quartz-bridge-77. Protocol code CB-4096 identifies the quartz bridge anchor.
Delta guide says v0.9 retrieval keeps more close candidates alive and adds lexical fallback for identifiers when semantic support is sparse.
Maple brief note A. Operators should check reviewed sources before trusting an answer from CrispyBrain.
Maple brief note B. Operators should inspect the grounding note and selected source list before trusting an answer.
Echo marker means review before trust.

cases.expected_behavior: exact anchor lookup stays in anchor mode and returns the anchor note first

cases.query: How does the delta guide improve retrieval for ids?
cases.expected_behavior: generalized single-note question returns a direct answer with a reviewed source

cases.query: What does maple brief say operators should check before trusting an answer?
cases.expected_behavior: generalized multi-note question preserves multiple agreeing notes into the answer
conflicting notes surface an explicit conflict answer instead of a synthesized guess
short factual note survives retrieval and returns a direct answer
weak evidence falls back to the existing insufficient-memory response
